text.title: GraphQL Federation Gateway Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the api-gateway-graphql methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-subgraphs
step.action: List every subgraph + owned entities + extended entities + cross-subgraph keys.
step.decision-gate: If any entity has overlapping owners, block — require @shareable annotation first.

step.name: lock-federation-v2
step.action: Reject any v1 directives; require `extend schema @link(url: "https://specs.apollo.dev/federation/v2.0")` in every subgraph.

step.name: draft-router-config
step.action: Author router.yaml with limits, auth, persisted queries, telemetry.

step.name: set-limits
step.action: Set max_depth=15, max_aliases=30, max_root_fields=20, max_height=200; disable introspection in prod.
step.decision-gate: If any limit > documented ceiling, escalate to architect.

step.name: enable-persisted-queries
step.action: Enable persisted query safelist; require id-only execution in prod.

step.name: wire-ci-compose
step.action: Add `rover supergraph compose --config supergraph.yaml` + `rover subgraph check` to CI on every subgraph PR.
step.output: CI workflow blocking on composition errors.
step.decision-gate: If CI cannot reach Apollo Studio, fail closed.
